description: Single-Family Residential (Group R-3) submittal checklist for the City of Santa Rosa, based on 2022 California Building Code cycle.

items.description: Plot plan showing property lines, setbacks, north arrow, and scale
items.notes: Must show all adjacent structures within 5 feet of property lines.

items.description: Grading and drainage plan showing existing and proposed grades, drainage flow direction, and finish floor elevation
items.notes: Must include spot elevations at corners of the building pad.

items.description: Location of existing and proposed utilities (water, sewer, gas, electrical) shown on site plan
items.notes: Include service lateral connections and meter locations.

items.description: Driveway dimensions, paving material, and slope indicated on site plan
items.notes: Maximum driveway slope 20%. Access gate setback per SRFD Standards.

items.description: Santa Rosa Planning Division Zoning Clearance (Form PD-100) attached
items.notes: Required per Santa Rosa local amendment before Building Division acceptance.

items.description: Wildland-Urban Interface (WUI) / Fire Zone 3 determination letter from SRFD or documentation that property is outside Fire Zone 3
items.notes: Required for all new construction. Contact SRFD at (707) 543-3500.

items.description: Foundation plan showing type, dimensions, reinforcement, and anchorage
items.notes: Include post-tensioned slab design where applicable. Slab-on-grade min. 3.5-inch thickness.

items.description: Soils report (geotechnical investigation) for sites in Liquefaction Hazard Zone or on expansive soils
items.notes: Required if site falls within Santa Rosa Liquefaction Hazard Zone per GIS portal.

items.description: Anchor bolt layout plan showing anchor bolt size, spacing, and plate washer specification
items.notes: Minimum 1/2-inch diameter anchor bolts at 6-foot maximum spacing with 3x3x1/4 plate washers in SDC D.

items.description: Floor plan(s) with all rooms labeled, dimensions, and door/window tags
items.notes: Minimum 1/8-inch scale. All rooms to be labeled with intended use.

items.description: Roof framing plan or rafter/truss layout indicating member sizes, spacing, species/grade, and spans
items.notes: Truss designs stamped by truss manufacturer engineer of record required at permit issuance.

items.description: Shear wall schedule and layout plan with hold-down locations
items.notes: Must include shear wall line designation, sheathing type, nailing pattern, and hold-down product number.

items.description: Building cross-sections showing floor-to-floor heights, ceiling heights, and structural connections
items.notes: Minimum one transverse and one longitudinal section required.

items.description: Exterior elevation drawings (all four sides) with finish material callouts and height dimensions
items.notes: Show maximum height above natural grade per Santa Rosa Zoning ordinance.

items.description: Header schedule or table specifying header sizes and spans at all openings
items.notes: References to CRC Table R602.7 are acceptable where spans and loads meet prescriptive limits.

items.description: Automatic fire sprinkler system plans (NFPA 13D) or deferred submittal notation
items.notes: Required for all new SFR in Santa Rosa. Deferred submittals must be approved by SRFD before frame inspection.

items.description: Smoke alarm locations shown on all floor plans, referencing CRC R314
items.notes: Required in each sleeping room, outside each sleeping area, on each story, and in basement.

items.description: Carbon monoxide alarm locations shown on floor plans, referencing CRC R315
items.notes: Required within 15 feet of each sleeping room entrance per Santa Rosa local policy.

items.description: WUI Chapter 7A compliance notes and details on plans (if in Fire Zone 3)
items.notes: Required if property is within Santa Rosa Fire Zone 3. Includes ignition-resistant construction details.

items.description: Mechanical floor plan showing equipment location, sizes, and duct layout
items.notes: All-electric HVAC required per Santa Rosa local amendment. Gas heating requires written justification.

items.description: HVAC equipment schedule with manufacturer model number, capacity (BTUH/tons), efficiency (SEER/HSPF), and fuel type
items.notes: Heat pump systems shall meet Title 24 Part 6 minimum efficiency requirements.

items.description: Whole-house mechanical ventilation system design per Title 24 Part 6 and ASHRAE 62.2
items.notes: Balanced ERV/HRV systems preferred for new construction.

items.description: Clothes dryer exhaust duct layout with length calculation and exterior termination detail
items.notes: Rigid metal duct required for full run per Santa Rosa policy BD-M-01. Max 35 ft equivalent length.

items.description: Electrical floor plan showing panel location, circuit layout, outlet locations, and fixture schedule
items.notes: Include all AFCI and GFCI circuit designations.

items.description: Electrical panel schedule with circuit numbers, breaker sizes, conductor sizes, and loads
items.notes: Must show EV charging circuit and reserved capacity for all-electric appliances per Santa Rosa local amendment.

items.description: EV charging outlet (240V/50A) provided at garage or primary parking space
items.notes: NEMA 14-50 or dedicated EVSE outlet. Required per Santa Rosa CARP EV readiness mandate.

items.description: Load calculation per CEC Article 220 (standard or optional method)
items.notes: Must demonstrate service size adequacy for full-electrification loads.

items.description: Plumbing floor plan and isometric diagram showing all supply and drain/waste/vent lines
items.notes: Include fixture unit count and pipe sizing calculation.

items.description: Water heater detail showing model, capacity, energy factor (UEF), seismic strapping, and gas or electric connection
items.notes: Heat pump water heaters strongly preferred. Gas water heaters require PRV and flex connector detail.

items.description: WaterSense fixture compliance table listing all lavatory faucets, kitchen faucets, showerheads, and toilets with flow rates
items.notes: Max flows: lavatory 1.2 gpm, kitchen 1.5 gpm, shower 1.8 gpm, toilet 1.28 gpf.

items.description: CF-1R Certificate of Compliance (CalCERTS or CHEERS registered) included with plan set
items.notes: Attached to plans as a named sheet. Registration number must be printed on the document.

items.description: CF-2R Installation Certificate forms (HVAC, insulation, windows) to be completed by installer at time of installation
items.notes: Deferred — installer to submit before final energy inspection.

items.description: Insulation schedule or table showing R-values for all assemblies (wall, ceiling, floor, slab edge)
items.notes: Must match values entered in CF-1R. Wall assembly type (framing + continuous insulation) to be detailed.

items.description: Window and glazing schedule with U-factor, SHGC, and total fenestration area
items.notes: NFRC label values required. Fire Zone 3 projects must show tempered inner pane.

items.description: Accessible route from public way to primary entrance dimensioned and slope noted (R-3 visitability or ADA path of travel if addition)
items.notes: Required for additions over $180,000 valuation triggering path-of-travel upgrade per CBC 11B-202.4.

items.description: Construction Waste Management Plan (CWMP) identifying diversion methods and local C&D recycling facilities
items.notes: Must name minimum two certified facilities within 20 miles of site per Santa Rosa local amendment.

items.description: CALGreen Tier 1 mandatory checklist (Santa Rosa local requirement) completed and signed
items.notes: Santa Rosa requires Tier 1 as mandatory baseline for all new SFR.
